brief: US continues strikes on Iran after soldiers killed in Jordan, while UK's new PM Burnham vows to end rough sleeping; papers explore AI feedback in education and visualization tools.
news_summary: Major news includes a man setting off an explosive device outside ICE offices in NYC, UK PM Burnham pledging to eliminate rough sleeping, and the Pentagon identifying two soldiers killed in Iran-linked attack. Protests in Delhi and ongoing US-Iran tensions also dominate.
papers_summary: Research highlights include studies on AI feedback in student writing, attention-guided saliency for interpreting visualizations, and the impact of ChatGPT on personal statement revision. A paper on debris tracking in hypervelocity impact imaging also appears.

en.brief: US continues strikes on Iran after soldiers killed in Jordan, while UK's new PM Burnham vows to end rough sleeping; papers explore AI feedback in education and visualization tools.
en.news_summary: Major news includes a man setting off an explosive device outside ICE offices in NYC, UK PM Burnham pledging to eliminate rough sleeping, and the Pentagon identifying two soldiers killed in Iran-linked attack. Protests in Delhi and ongoing US-Iran tensions also dominate.
en.papers_summary: Research highlights include studies on AI feedback in student writing, attention-guided saliency for interpreting visualizations, and the impact of ChatGPT on personal statement revision. A paper on debris tracking in hypervelocity impact imaging also appears.

zh.brief: 英国新首相贝安德上任，中英关系或迎新篇章；2026年美加墨世界杯落幕，争议不断；中国外卖骑手王计兵获顶级文学奖；科研方面，AI在写作反馈和可视化理解中的影响受到关注。
zh.news_summary: 贝安德就任英国首相，其中国政策引关注；世界杯决赛西班牙加时胜阿根廷，但赛事争议引发讨论；朝鲜人通过K-pop接触外界，中国蓝领工人文学作品获奖。
zh.papers_summary: 多项研究探讨AI在写作反馈中的应用效果，以及视觉语言模型如何理解数据可视化。

todays_image.caption: The prison cell entrance echoes the explosive breach at 26 Federal Plaza as both represent points where safety and captivity violently intersect.
todays_image.title: Prison Cell Entrance
